subject: Special Digital and Home Delivery Subscription Offers
body:
Try a Digital Subscription for Just $5 for 12 Weeks
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

SUBSCRIBE TO THE TIMES EXPERIENCE AND SAVE.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Try a Digital Subscription for Just $5 for 12 Weeks

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you 
to the news, stories and insights that impact your world.

Stay informed and inspired with unlimited digital access to 
NYTimes.com; delivering immersive storytelling and innovative 
multimedia coverage of the topics that interest you most. Plus, 
enjoy the world's finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, 
anywhere, with unlimited access to all of our best-in-class apps 
for smartphones and tablets.

GET DIGITAL:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/sub2

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Or Get 75% Off Home Delivery for 12 Weeks. Includes FREE All 
Digital Access.

Enjoy the convenience of starting your day with the world's premier 
newspaper at this new special rate. Plus, all home delivery 
subscribers get unlimited access to NYTimes.com and our smartphone 
and tablet apps, free!

GET HOME DELIVERY:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/hdsub

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times.

New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from 
e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times 
Crosswords apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. 
All subscriptions will automatically renew and the credit card 
will be charged in advance of each billing period unless canceled. 
If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access 
will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Other restrictions and 
taxes may apply.  

New York Times Home Delivery subscriptions are valid only in areas 
served by The New York Times Delivery Service. Subscription options 
are available at 75% off the regular rate for 12 weeks. You will be 
billed in advance of each 4-week billing period. At the end of the 
introductory period, service will continue at the regular rate 
unless you cancel your subscription. Prices are subject to change. 
Product availability and price may vary by region. Some addresses 
in a ZIP code may not be serviceable. State and local taxes will 
be added where applicable. Other restrictions may apply.  

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTMVOuB81HXJB85BY5AAwENcvC/unsub?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261
